title: Asia markets trade mixed as murkey U.S.-Iran peace talks prospects keep investors on edge
summary_full: Asia-Pacific markets traded mixed as the prospect of a peace deal in the Middle East remained murky amid contradictory messaging from the U.S. and Iran.
